who: junior associates at law firms processing 5–15 client briefings/month
offer: For junior associates at law firms processing 5–15 client briefings/month, inefficient formatting causes delays in client communication. We automate the briefing process instead of manual formatting and summarizing of legal research.
problem: inefficient conversion of legal research into client briefings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for junior associates seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to junior associates with demo video
Community forums where junior associates share tools
try_it: Let users try manual input for legal research and templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
